join_order.probe: num (filtered: uom='USD' AND value IS NOT NULL)
join_order.notes: Most selective dimension filter (6.1% pass). Probe sub_adsh_index per num row, check sic BETWEEN 4000 AND 4999. Fail-fast: ~93.9% rejection eliminates need to probe pre/tag.

Second most selective filter (11.2% pass on stmt='EQ'). Probe pre_join_index on (adsh_code, tag_code, version_code) — multivalue: iterate payload rows checking pre_stmt[pre_row]==eq_code. Early-exit if no pre row passes stmt filter.
Least selective filter (95% pass, abstract=0). Probe tag_index on (tag_code, version_code). Yields tag_row for tlabel_code (GROUP BY key) and abstract check.

probe_order_rationale: sub (0.061) → pre (0.112) → tag (0.95). Ordered by ascending selectivity for maximum early-termination benefit. Most num rows (93.9%) rejected at sub+sic check, never reaching pre or tag probes.

filters.notes: Resolve 'USD' dict code at startup from num/uom_dict.txt
Test std::isnan(v) — NaN sentinel for NULL
Raw int32_t range check: sub_sic[sub_row] >= 4000 && sub_sic[sub_row] <= 4999
Resolve 'EQ' dict code at startup from pre/stmt_dict.txt; check pre_stmt[pre_row] == eq_code

data_structures.sub_adsh_index: pre-built mmap hash table (SubSlot{adsh_code,sub_row}, cap=262144, sentinel adsh_code==-1, hash_i32)
data_structures.pre_join_index: pre-built mmap multivalue hash table (PreSlot{adsh_code,tag_code,version_code,payload_offset,payload_count}, cap=next_pow2(n_unique*2), pool=uint32_t[], sentinel adsh_code==-1, hash_i32x3)
data_structures.tag_index: pre-built mmap hash table (TagSlot{tag_code,version_code,tag_row}, cap=4194304, sentinel tag_code==-1, hash_i32x2)
data_structures.aggregation: thread-local open-addressing hash map keyed by Q4Key{int32_t sic; int32_t tlabel_code; int16_t stmt_code} (pack to 12 bytes), value={int64_t sum_cents, int64_t cnt, unordered_set<int32_t> cik_set}; capacity=next_pow2(group_cardinality*2)
data_structures.topk_buffer: std::vector<ResultRow> with std::partial_sort for LIMIT 500 (O(n log k))

aggregation_key.struct: Q4Key { int32_t sic; int32_t tlabel_code; int16_t stmt_code; }
aggregation_key.note_C15: ALL THREE GROUP BY dimensions must be in key — missing any one causes wrong group merging
aggregation_key.value_struct: { int64_t sum_cents; int64_t cnt; std::unordered_set<int32_t> cik_set; }
aggregation_key.distinct_cik: per-group unordered_set<int32_t> collecting sub_cik[sub_row]; size() after merge = COUNT(DISTINCT cik)
aggregation_key.sum_avg_C29: MANDATORY int64_t cents accumulator: iv=llround(v*100.0); sum_cents+=iv; cnt++; AVG=(double)sum_cents/cnt/100.0

parallelism.work_division: num rows partitioned into morsels (~65536 rows each); each thread processes its morsel independently with thread-local aggregation map
parallelism.merge: sequential merge of 64 thread-local maps into final map (P17/P20) — merge cik_sets per group, accumulate sum_cents and cnt
parallelism.note_P17: NEVER use shared aggregation map with mutex — use thread-local then single merge pass

having: cik_set.size() >= 2 — applied after merge during result materialization

output.string_quoting_C31: ALL string columns (tlabel, stmt) must be wrapped in double-quotes — printf("\"%s\"", str.c_str())

correctness_checklist: C15: Q4Key must include sic + tlabel_code + stmt_code (all three GROUP BY dimensions)
C24: All index probes use bounded for-loop (probe < cap), not unbounded while
C27: Each index: declare cap, mask=cap-1, ht-pointer at function scope before any loop
C29: sum/avg on num.value MUST use int64_t cents — NO double/long double/Kahan accumulator
C31: Double-quote tlabel AND stmt in CSV output (tlabel may contain commas)
C33: Secondary sort key (sic ASC) for deterministic TOP-500 output on total_value ties
C2: Resolve usd_code and eq_code from dicts at runtime — never hardcode
